description_long: This is a realistic crab with a broad, slightly convex carapace that is mottled in shades of gray, brown, and white. The crab features two prominent claws (chelae), one of which is noticeably larger, and eight walking legs that are jointed and covered in a hard exoskeleton. Its eyes are set on short stalks at the front of the carapace, and two slender antennae are visible. The surface of the crab is hard and slightly glossy, with a rough, textured appearance typical of marine crustaceans. The underside is lighter in color, and the legs and claws show subtle banding and segmentation.
description: A hard-shelled crab with mottled gray and brown coloring, two large claws, and eight jointed legs. Its eyes are on short stalks and the surface is rough and glossy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the crab's broad carapace, both claws extended, and eyes on stalks clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the segmentation of the legs and the size difference between the two claws.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the carapace and the arrangement of the walking legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the curvature of the carapace and the underside of the larger claw.
